title: The Crew Chooses Crocodile
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on the crew chooses crocodile, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Crew Chooses Crocodile. Luffy refuses to let Vivi carry the country alone, forcing her to face what it will actually take to stop Crocodile. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: "You quit!"

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy, what're you talkin' about!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey Luffy! We've got no time to play along with one of your whims right now!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Well we're going back, aren't we?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yeah, that's right.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We have to head to Katorea 'cause that's where the rebles are!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You do realize we're trying to stop a huge civil war involving a million combatants that's going to start any time now, right?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is all to help Vivil! Did you forget already!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I dum' wanna.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You what!?

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: ...Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: I want to kick Croco- Dile's ass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even if you manage to stop the rebels,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do you think Crocedile will just stop...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Even if we go with you to the rebel base, there's nothing we can do.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We're pirates, after all. In fact, it's better if we're not there at all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: - The number of

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm surprised an idiot like him can still hit the bulls- eye at times...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah, you said it.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Well, that's-

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: In your mind,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You think things will be just fine as long as nobody dies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The citizens,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Rebels, and even us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even though you're up against one of the Royal Shichibukai,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: In the midst of civil war involving a million people,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're still hoping for everyone to be all right!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't you think that's naive?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Luffy! You're not thinking of Vivi's feelings at a-

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Nami, wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let him finish.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So what if that's the case!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What's exactly wrong with wishing for no one to die!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: ...People die.

summary: This part develops the crew chooses crocodile and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
